item.title: A Pregnant Teen's Dreams Ended In Heartbreaking Tragedy
item.description: Mia Campos was a 16 year old Georgia teenager preparing to welcome her first child when she suddenly disappeared. What began as a desperate search by her family soon became a homicide investigation that left a community mourning the loss of both Mia and her unborn son.

media:content.media:title: A Pregnant Teen's Dreams Ended In Heartbreaking Tragedy
media:content.media:description: Mia Campos was a 16 year old Georgia teenager preparing to welcome her first child when she suddenly disappeared. What began as a desperate search by her family soon became a homicide investigation that left a community mourning the loss of both Mia and her unborn son.

item.title: A Missing Boy Returned Home But Something Was Wrong
item.description: Nicholas Barclay disappeared from Texas in 1994, leaving his family desperate for answers. Years later, someone claiming to be Nicholas resurfaced overseas, but the shocking truth behind his identity turned the case into one of the most bizarre stories in true crime history.

media:content.media:title: A Missing Boy Returned Home But Something Was Wrong
media:content.media:description: Nicholas Barclay disappeared from Texas in 1994, leaving his family desperate for answers. Years later, someone claiming to be Nicholas resurfaced overseas, but the shocking truth behind his identity turned the case into one of the most bizarre stories in true crime history.

item.title: A Late Night Crash Led To A Highly Debated Trial
item.description: Mackenzie Shirilla was accused of intentionally driving a vehicle into a building, resulting in the deaths of two passengers. The case drew national attention as prosecutors and defense attorneys offered sharply different explanations for what happened that night.

media:content.media:title: A Late Night Crash Led To A Highly Debated Trial
media:content.media:description: Mackenzie Shirilla was accused of intentionally driving a vehicle into a building, resulting in the deaths of two passengers. The case drew national attention as prosecutors and defense attorneys offered sharply different explanations for what happened that night.

item.title: A Secret Affair Ended In A Deadly Confrontation
item.description: Emmett Corrigan was a successful attorney whose extramarital relationship became the center of a tragic case in Idaho. When the affair was discovered, a confrontation turned deadly, leading to a highly publicized investigation and courtroom battle.

media:content.media:title: A Secret Affair Ended In A Deadly Confrontation
media:content.media:description: Emmett Corrigan was a successful attorney whose extramarital relationship became the center of a tragic case in Idaho. When the affair was discovered, a confrontation turned deadly, leading to a highly publicized investigation and courtroom battle.
